name: cc-plugin-eval
description: Local-first CLI to evaluate Claude Code plugins and skills: token-budget analysis, manifest/hook/MCP/agent linting, scoring, comparison, improvement briefs, and real claude benchmarking.

interface.shortDescription: Claude-Code-native plugin and skill evaluator. Static analysis + token budgeting + benchmarking across the full Claude…
interface.longDescription: Claude-Code-native plugin and skill evaluator. Static analysis + token budgeting + benchmarking across the full Claude component surface (manifest, hooks, MCP, LSP, monitors, agents, marketplace, userConfig). Forked from openai/plugins plugin-eval (MIT) and rewritten for Claude Code conventions; complements skill-creator's per-skill LLM grading with whole-plugin scoring.
defaultPrompt: Use CC Plugin Eval on this repo.
